refnamediv.refpurpose: Get the values of the specified band as a 2-dimension array.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Get the values of the specified band as a 2-dimension array (first index is row, second is column). If nband is NULL or not provided, all raster bands are processed.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
WITH foo AS ( SELECT ST_SetValue(ST_AddBand(ST_MakeEmptyRaster(3, 3, 0, 0, 1, -1, 0, 0, 0), 1, '8BUI', 1, 0), 1, 2, 5) AS rast ) SELECT (ST_DumpValues(rast, 1))[2][1] FROM foo;
st_dumpvalues --------------- 5 (1 row)
